title: Magic Collection Hard Softy Club Double Brush by Magic Collection
features: Magic collection hard & soft double club brush with natural boar bristle 7714
description: Product description Magic Collection Hard Soft Club Brush #7714 Satin Finish Natural Wood Handle Magic Collection, real boar bristle brush is designed to stimulate and massage the scalp while cleaning hair, removing dirt, excess oil and scalp flakes as you brush. Hard and soft brush specially designed with 100% natural boar bristles and lacquered wooden handle. Directions [HI] 1. Remove the hair brush from its packaging. 2. Comb your hair gently by combing from the roots to the tips with the hard side and smoothing with the soft side. 3. Clean the brush regularly by removing hair from the bristles.
